channel.title: 2020 on HRLB Lab
channel.description: Recent content in 2020 on HRLB Lab

item.title: Instance Segmentation for Whole Slide Imaging: End-to-End or Detect-Then-Segment
item.description:
Aadarsh Jha, Haichun Yang, Ruining Deng, Meghan E. Kapp, Agnes B. Fogo, Yuankai Huo
Journal of Medical Imaging (2020)

item.title: CircleNet: Anchor-free Detection with Circle Representation
item.description:
Haichun Yang, Ruining Deng, Yuzhe Lu, Zheyu Zhu, Ye Chen, Joseph T. Roland, Le Lu, Bennett A. Landman, Agnes B. Fogo, Yuankai Huo
MICCAI (2020)

item.title: A Deep Pattern Recognition Approach for Inferring Respiratory Volume Fluctuations from fMRI Data
item.description:
Roza Bayrak, Jorge Salas, Yuankai Huo, Catie Chang
MICCAI (2020)

item.title: Reliable Liver Fibrosis Assessment from Ultrasound using Global Hetero-Image Fusion and View-Specific Parameterization
item.description:
Bowen Li, Ke Yan, Dar‐In Tai, Yuankai Huo, Le Lu, Jing Xiao, Adam Harrison
MICCAI (2020)

item.title: Lesion Harvester: Iteratively Mining Unlabeled Lesions and Hard-Negative Examples at Scale
item.description:
Jinzheng Cai, Adam P. Harrison, Youjing Zheng, Ke Yan, Yuankai Huo, Jing Xiao, Lin Yang, Le Lu
IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging (2020)

item.title: Harvesting, Detecting, and Characterizing Liver Lesions from Large-scale Multi-phase CT Data via Deep Dynamic Texture Learning
item.description:
Yuankai Huo, Jinzheng Cai, Chi-Tung Cheng, Ashwin Raju, Ke Yan, Bennett A. Landman, Jing Xiao, Le Lu, Chien-Hung Liao, Adam Harrison
ArXiv (2020)

item.title: The Value of Nullspace Tuning Using Partial Label Information
item.description:
Colin B. Hansen, Vishwesh Nath, Diego A. Mesa, Yuankai Huo, Bennett A. Landman, Thomas A. Lasko
ArXiv (2020)

item.title: Co-Heterogeneous and Adaptive Segmentation from Multi-Source and Multi-Phase CT Imaging Data: A Study on Pathological Liver and Lesion Segmentation
item.description:
Ashwin Raju, Chi-Tung Cheng, Yuankai Huo, Jinzheng Cai, Junzhou Huang, Jing Xiao, Le Lu, ChienHung Liao, Adam P Harrison
ECCV (2020)

item.title: JSSR: A Joint Synthesis, Segmentation, and Registration System for 3D Multi-Modal Image Alignment of Large-scale Pathological CT Scans
item.description:
Fengze Liu, Jingzheng Cai, Yuankai Huo, Chi-Tung Cheng, Ashwin Raju, Dakai Jin, Jing Xiao, Alan Yuille, Le Lu, ChienHung Liao, Adam P Harrison
ECCV (2020)
